content: We can reframe Self-Refine’s iterative single-perspective self-improvement pipeline as a base framework that can be augmented with multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to eliminate blind spots in self-feedback. This creates a two-layer self-refinement system that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while fixing the common flaw of single-perspective self-feedback being unable to identify its own errors.
